Looking for durable fiberglass materials? 🛠️ Look no further – serve quality, build excellence. 🌊 Order now and take your marine projects to the next level! 
Call us on +254774145111 OR +254777030811. We deliver throughout East Africa! #marinefiberglassdirect #buildsmart #fiberglassboat #fiberglassdesign #kenya #eastafrica

🎣 Welcome to Servemarine! 🌊

Your one-stop shop for all things fishing and marine! From top-quality fishing gear to stylish apparel, slippers, and accessories, we’ve got it all under one roof. 🐟✨

📍 Find us along Ronald Ngala Street, Saba Saba, Mombasa.
Come and gear up for your next big catch! 🎣🔥

#servemarine #fishinggear #mombasa #kenya #fishinglife #kenyafishing

Purpose-built.

Delivered for operations on Lake Naivasha, tailored to the client’s use.

Built around you.

#servemarine #boatbuilders #marinekenya #customboats #lakenaivasha

From the Easter Frolic competition 🎣

Proud to have sponsored the event and brought Pioneer Tackle down to showcase their latest rods, reels and lines.

Good turnout, even better energy!

Fiberglass materials available — wholesale & retail.

Fibermatt, woven, resin, gelcoat, hardener and more.

Quality you can rely on.

📍Mombasa, Kenya
DM to order or inquire.

Built for the water.

Smooth. Reliable. Ready for anything.
 

📸: @eddy_raymond
#servemarine #fishing #boatlife #fishinglures #pulsator

Bob Marlin shirts available for customization.

Perfect for crews, boats, or just your own style.

DM us if you want one done.🤙🏾

From raw fiberglass to open water.
This boat started as a blank shell and a clear vision from the client.

Every detail was custom:
– hull shape
– layout
– finishes
– seating
– functionality

Nothing off the shelf. Nothing guessed.
Built, adjusted, and refined step by step until it matched exactly what was asked for.

This is the process most people never see —
the dust, the measurements, the trial and error — before it becomes a finished boat on the water.

Custom means listening.
Custom means precision.
Custom means doing it right, not fast.

If you’re looking to build something that’s truly yours, you know where to find us.

#servemarine #customboatbuild #boattransformation #fromscratch #boatbuilders #mombasa #mombasabusiness #ʙᴜɪʟᴛɴᴏᴛʙᴏᴜɢʜᴛ

Proof is in the bite.

Mahi on a Pulsator lure - clean hit, solid hookup.

Pulsator lures now available in store. @pulsatorlures 
#pulsatorlures #servemarine #mahimahi #offshorefishing

Jamhuri weekend on the water 🇰🇪🎣

The Jamhuri Fishing Competition on the 13th brought together 10 boats, great fishing and some solid prizes.
Proud to have sponsored this event as Servemarine, in partnership with Mazuzee.

It was a very successful day overall, and we’re hoping to see even more boats on the water next year.
Thank you to everyone who took part and made it a success.

Tight lines.

Restocked & ready. Ringer Swivels for clean rigs, zero twists, and smoother hookups. 
Now available at #servemarine

✅ Fiberglass hull

✅ Ocean-ready and fully serviced

📍Available now in Mombasa
💬 DM to book a viewing or get today’s price — serious buyers only ⚓️

Custom-Built 24ft Panga – Designed and manufactured by Servemarine in Kenya.
✅ Twin Honda 100HP outboard engines for power and efficiency
✅ Reinforced fiberglass hull for durability in all conditions
✅ Custom deck layout for fishing, cruising, and utility use with fully equipped imported T-Top and ONWA marine electronics
✅ Built to client specifications for optimal performance and comfort

Servemarine specializes in manufacturing high-quality fiberglass boats from 10ft to 42ft, tailored to meet diverse marine needs across East Africa.

Fishing season is right around the corner — are you ready?
We were proud to sponsor this competition, with winners walking away with some of the best in the game: Pulsator Lures, Squid Nation, and Mazuzee rigs - all available at ServeMarine.

🛥️ Whether you’re prepping for your next big catch or stocking up early, we’ve got you covered.
📍Visit us in-store or DM to shop nationwide.

🔍 What’s under the surface matters.

Here’s a behind-the-scenes look at what we found beneath a boat we were repairing — rotted wood hidden under poorly layered fiberglass.

This kind of shortcut weakens the entire structure and risks your safety on the water. At ServeMarine, we strip everything back and rebuild it right — from the inside out.

🛠️ Repairs. Refits. Full fiberglass work.
📍 Mombasa | Built by ServeMarine
📩 CONTACT US to book an inspection

Crafted for the Coast. Built for You. 🌊⚓
Our custom 23FT PANGA fiberglass boats are made for strength, stability, and style — whether you’re fishing, transporting, or just enjoying the Kenyan coast.

🔧 This build includes:
• Center console with steering & control box
• Front & rear fiberglass bench seating
• Marine-grade canopy for sun protection
• Fitted with an outboard engine (brand varies by client)

💡 Want something different? We offer add-ons like livewells, rod holders, nav lights, fish finders & more — fully customized to your needs.

📍 Built by ServeMarine
📩 CONTACT US to start your custom order

#mombasabusiness #boatlovers #coastvibes #kenyanmade #outboardengine

✔️ Buy 3kg+ → Free Brush
✔️ Buy 5kg+ → Gloves + Brush
✔️ Buy 20kg → 2 Gloves + 2 Brushes
